case_title: ALOK VASUDEV ET AL VS. AMY TODD

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-07-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TODD, AMY
(SC-145)JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS TO PROCESS -SCANNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASUDEV, ALOK MEHTA, NIYATI AS TO DEFENDANT TODD, AMY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASUDEV, ALOK AS TO DEFENDANT TODD, AMY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFFS ALOK VASUDEV AND NIYATI MEHTA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMY TODD IS PRESENT. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON MARCH 8, 2022)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASUDEV, ALOK MEHTA, NIYATI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TODD, AMY $1,861.08 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,946.08, *SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION* STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0522509D001, TAG # 036904 BY DEFENDANT TODD, AMY
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,314.42 FILED BY VASUDEV, ALOK MEHTA, NIYATI AS TO DEFENDANT TODD, AMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASUDEV, ALOK MEHTA, NIYATI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TODD, AMY $1,861.08 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,926.08, JUDGMENT AMENDED TO REFLECT THE CORRECT AMOUNT OF COURT COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT TODD, AMY
